titleStmt.title: SII 9.351: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 351. (A.R. No. 105-A of 1904.) ON A SLAB SET UP ON THE NORTH SIDE OF THE MALE-MALLAPPA TEMPLE AT BAGALI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: The record is dated in the year Nandana, Kārtika, śu. 5 Sōmavāra in the reign of the Hoysaḷa king Vīra-Narasiṁha (III). If panchamī is a mistake for paurṇamī the date would correspond to A.D. 1292 October 27 Monday. The Heggaḍe Chandayya, son of Beṭṭiya-Nāyaka, who was the Haṟekāra of Moguvāḍa-Mācharasa made a gift of some garden land for the service of the god Nīlēśvaradēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmatu hoysaḷaśrīvīranārasiṁhadēvavarśada naṁda
nasaṁvatsarada kārtika sudda paṁchami sōmavāradaṁdu śrīmatu ha
riścaṁdradattiya mahāgrahāraṁ bāguḷiya nīlagiryya nīlēśvara
dēvargge moguvāḍamācarasana haṟekāṟa beṭiyanayakana maga
nu heggaḍe caṁdayyanu Ā dēvara Aṁgabhōgaraṁgabhōgakke beḷḷeyakaṭṭada tanna
tōṭagaṭina kaṁbha 100 vaṁ Ā bāguḷiya Aśēṣamahājanaṁgaḷa sa
ṁnidhiyalu dhārāpūrvakavaṁ māḍidanu .
Digital edition of SII 9.351 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
